category.name: IRDAI Health Insurance Regulations
category.description: Key regulations for health insurance policies in India

facts.key_hi: पहले से मौजूद बीमारी की प्रतीक्षा अवधि
facts.value: Maximum 48 months (4 years). No policy can impose more than 48 months waiting period for pre-existing diseases. After this period insurer must cover PED claims.
Maximum 30 days from policy start. Only accident hospitalization is covered during this period.
facts.value_hi: पॉलिसी शुरू होने से अधिकतम 30 दिन।

facts.value: Maximum 24 months for named diseases: cataracts, joint replacement, hernia, piles, sinusitis, tonsillectomy, kidney stones, gallstones.
facts.value_hi: नामित रोगों के लिए अधिकतम 24 महीने।

facts.value: 15 days for offline, 30 days for online policies. Full refund minus proportionate risk premium on cancellation.
Can port between insurers without losing waiting period credit. Apply 45 days before renewal.
facts.value_hi: बिना प्रतीक्षा अवधि क्रेडिट खोए बीमाकर्ता बदल सकते हैं।

facts.value: At network hospitals. Emergency pre-auth: insurer responds within 1 hour. Planned: 24 hours.
facts.value_hi: नेटवर्क अस्पतालों में। आपातकालीन: 1 घंटे में जवाब।

facts.value: Must settle or reject within 30 days of documents. Delayed settlement attracts bank rate + 2% interest.
All individual policies guaranteed renewable for life except fraud. Cannot refuse based on claims history.
facts.value_hi: सभी पॉलिसी जीवन भर नवीनीकरण गारंटी।

facts.value: All policies must cover Ayurveda, Yoga, Unani, Siddha, Homeopathy on same basis as allopathic treatment.
facts.value_hi: सभी पॉलिसी में आयुष उपचार कवर अनिवार्य।

facts.value: NCB for claim-free years: 5-50% increased sum insured or premium discount. Maintained on portability.
facts.value_hi: दावा-मुक्त वर्षों पर NCB: 5-50% बढ़ी बीमा राशि।
